package rulecoverage

func PositiveServefileViaReadfileThenCData() string {
    ruleID := "servefile_via_readfile_then_c_data"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Handlers that load files into memory and then write them through gin.Context.Data(...) instead of using file helpers or streaming."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
